docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT STARMARS TECH INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION; MARION BALANDRA, AN INDIVIDUAL, A.K.A JUNIO MARION REINARES, EACH JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STARMARS TECH INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION; MARION BALANDRA, AN INDIVIDUAL, A.K.A JUNIO MARION REINARES, EACH JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE $98,287.57 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $98,287.57, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
